title: Grey bashful bunny — deep clean, nose repair, and restuff
description: A floppy grey bashful-style bunny arrived tired and grubby. We deep cleaned the pile, rebuilt the nose, and restuffed the body so it sits soft and even again.
itemDetails:
This grey bashful bunny is a soft plush rabbit in the contemporary nursery/gift style that has been widely sold since the 2000s. The "bashful" naming convention is common across boutique plush ranges and usually indicates a floppy, long-limbed rabbit designed for cuddling and display.

Construction is generally polyester plush fabric with polyester fiber fill and safety-stitched facial details.
repairDetails: The bunny needed a full refresh: the plush had picked up soil and the nose area had worn or split enough to need rebuilding rather than a quick surface clean. We deep cleaned the fabric and pile, repaired and shaped the nose, then restuffed the body for an even fill and a natural floppy bashful stance.
